t.khattab: Do not take a ˹human˺ life—made sacred by Allah—except with ˹legal˺ right. If anyone is killed unjustly, We have given their heirs the authority, but do not let them exceed limits in retaliation, for they are already supported ˹by law˺
t.ghali: And do not kill the self that Allah has prohibited, except by truthful (right) (Literally: with the truth). And whoever is killed unjustly, We have (already) appointed to his patron authority. So let him not exceed (Literally: be extravagant) in killing; surely he will be vindicated
t.irving: Do not kill any soul whom God has forbidden you to, except through [due process of] law. We have given his nearest relatives authority for anyone who is killed unjustly-yet let him not overdo things in killing [the culprit], inasmuch as he has been so supported
t.iwq: And do not kill the soul which Allah has forbidden, except by right. And whoever is killed unjustly - We have given his heir authority, but let him not exceed limits in the matter of taking life. Indeed, he has been supported by the law

t_id.kemenag: Dan janganlah kamu membunuh jiwa yang diharamkan Allah (membunuhnya), melainkan dengan suatu (alasan) yang benar. Dan barangsiapa dibunuh secara zalim, maka sesungguhnya Kami telah memberi kekuasaan kepada ahli warisnya, tetapi janganlah ahli waris itu melampaui batas dalam membunuh. Sesungguhnya ia adalah orang yang mendapat pertolongan.
t_id.sabiq: Janganlah kalian membunuh jiwa yang diharamkan oleh Allah untuk dibunuh kecuali demi kebenaran seperti, misalnya, orang itu pantas untuk dibunuh sebagai kisas atau hukuman baginya. Barangsiapa dibunuh secara zalim, maka Kami berikan kepada keluarga terdekatnya kekuasaan penuh untuk menuntut balas (kisas) si pembunuhnya kepada hakim. Tetapi tidak diperkenankan bagi mereka melampaui batas dalam membunuh seperti, misalnya, membunuh orang tidak melakukannya atau membunuh dua orang sebagai pembalasan atas terbunuhnya satu orang. Sesungguhnya Allah menolongnya dan telah mewajibkannya untuk melakukan kisas atau memilih diyat. Maka tidak dibenarkan sama sekali untuk melampaui batas.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kalian membunuh jiwa yang diharamkan Allah membunuhnya melainkan dengan suatu alasan yang benar. Dan barang siapa dibunuh secara zalim, maka sesungguhnya Kami telah memberi kepada wali si terbunuh) yakni para ahli warisnya (kekuasaan) terhadap si pembunuhnya (tetapi janganlah ahli waris itu berlebihan-lebihan) melampaui batas (dalam membunuh) seumpamanya ahli waris itu membunuh orang yang bukan si pembunuh atau ia membunuh si pembunuh dengan cara yang lain. (Sesungguhnya ia adalah orang yang mendapat pertolongan.)
t_id.iwq: Dan janganlah kamu membunuh jiwa yang diharamkan Allah (membunuhnya), melainkan dengan suatu (alasan) yang benar. Dan barangsiapa dibunuh secara zalim, maka sesungguhnya Kami telah memberi kekuasaan kepada ahli warisnya, tetapi janganlah ahli waris itu melampaui batas dalam membunuh. Sesungguhnya ia adalah orang yang mendapat pertolongan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولا تقتلوا النفس التي حرم الله إلا بالحق ومن قُتل مظلوما فقد جعلنا لوليه» لوارثه «سلطانا» تسلطا على القاتل «فلا يسرف» يتجاوز الحد «في القتل» بأن يقتل غير قاتله أو بغير ما قتل به «إنه كان منصورا»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَا تَقۡتُلُواْ ٱلنَّفۡسَ ٱلَّتِي حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّۗ وَمَن قُتِلَ مَظۡلُومٗا فَقَدۡ جَعَلۡنَا لِوَلِيِّهِۦ سُلۡطَٰنٗا فَلَا يُسۡرِف فِّي ٱلۡقَتۡلِۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مَنصُورٗا (لِوَلِيِّهِ: مَنْ تَوَلَّى أَمْرَ القَتِيلِ مِنْ وَارِثٍ، أَوْ حَاكِمٍ, سُلْطَانًا: حُجَّةً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kalian membunuh jiwa yang diharamkan Allah membunuhnya melainkan dengan suatu alasan yang benar. Dan barang siapa dibunuh secara zalim, maka sesungguhnya Kami telah memberi kepada wali si terbunuh) yakni para ahli warisnya (kekuasaan) terhadap si pembunuhnya (tetapi janganlah ahli waris itu berlebihan-lebihan) melampaui batas (dalam membunuh) seumpamanya ahli waris itu membunuh orang yang bukan si pembunuh atau ia membunuh si pembunuh dengan cara yang lain. (Sesungguhnya ia adalah orang yang mendapat pertolongan)

ar: وَلَا تَقۡرَبُوا۟ مَالَ ٱلۡیَتِیمِ إِلَّا بِٱلَّتِی هِیَ أَحۡسَنُ حَتَّىٰ یَبۡلُغَ أَشُدَّهُۥۚ وَأَوۡفُوا۟ بِٱلۡعَهۡدِۖ إِنَّ ٱلۡعَهۡدَ كَانَ مَسۡءُولࣰا
ar_simple: ولا تقربوا مال ٱلیتیم إلا بٱلتی هی أحسن حتى یبلغ أشده وأوفوا بٱلعهد إن ٱلعهد كان مسءولا

t.sahih-int: And do not approach the property of an orphan, except in the way that is best, until he reaches maturity. And fulfill [every] commitment. Indeed, the commitment is ever [that about which one will be] questioned
t.asad: And do not touch the substance of an orphan, save to improve it, before he comes of age. And be true to every promise - for, verily, [on Judgment Day] you will be called to account for every promise which you have made
t.yusuf-ali: Come not nigh to the orphan's property except to improve it, until he attains the age of full strength; and fulfil (every) engagement, for (every) engagement will be enquired into (on the Day of Reckoning)
t.pickthall: Come not near the wealth of the orphan save with that which is better till he come to strength; and keep the covenant. Lo! of the covenant it will be asked
t.arberry: And do not approach the property of the orphan save in the fairest manner, until he is of age. And fulfil the covenant; surely the covenant shall be questioned of
t.hilali-khan: And come not near to the orphan's property except to improve it, until he attains the age of full strength. And fulfil (every) covenant. Verily! the covenant, will be questioned about
t.itani: And do not go near the orphan’s property, except with the best of intentions, until he has reached his maturity. And honor your pledge, because the pledge involves responsibility.
t.mubarakpuri: And come not near to the orphan's property except to improve it, until he attains the age of full strength. And fulfill (every) covenant. Verily, the covenant will be questioned about.
t.qarib: And do not approach an orphan's property before he reaches maturity, except with the best possible way. And be true to all you have committed to do, for truly [on the Day of Judgment], you will have to answer for every promise that you have made
t.wahiduddin: Do not go near the orphans' property, except with the best of intentions, until they reach maturity. Keep your promises; you will be called to account for every promise which you have made
t.shakir: And draw not near to the property of the orphan except in a goodly way till he attains his maturity and fulfill the promise; surely (every) promise shall be questioned about
t.haleem: Do not go near the orphan’s property, except with the best [intentions], until he reaches the age of maturity. Honour your pledges: you will be questioned about your pledges
t.maariful: Do not go near the property of an orphan, except in a manner that is good, until he comes to his maturity. And fulfill the covenant. Surely, the covenant shall be asked about (on the Day of Reckoning)
t.khattab: Do not come near the wealth of the orphan—unless intending to enhance it—until they attain maturity. Honour ˹your˺ pledges, for you will surely be accountable for them
t.ghali: And do not draw near the wealth of the orphan except in the fairest (manner) until he reaches full age; and fulfil the covenant. Surely the covenant will be questioned of
t.irving: Do not approach an orphan´s estate before he comes of age unless it is to improve it. Fulfill your oaths; any promise will be checked into
t.iwq: And do not approach the property of an orphan, except in the way that is best, until he reaches maturity. And fulfill every commitment. Indeed, the commitment is ever that about which one will be questioned

t_id.kemenag: Dan janganlah kamu mendekati harta anak yatim, kecuali dengan cara yang lebih baik (bermanfaat) sampai ia dewasa dan penuhilah janji; sesungguhnya janji itu pasti diminta pertanggungan jawabnya.
t_id.sabiq: Janganlah kalian menggunakan harta anak yatim kecuali dengan cara yang paling baik untuk mengembangkan dan menginvestasikannya. Lakukan hal itu terus sampai anak-anak itu dewasa. Bila mereka sudah dewasa serahkanlah harta itu. Peliharalah setiap janji yang kalian berikan. Sesungguhnya Allah akan meminta pertanggungjawaban orang yang tidak menepati janji dan akan membalasnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kalian mendekati harta anak yatim kecuali dengan cara yang lebih baik/bermanfaat sampai ia dewasa dan penuhilah janji) jika kalian berjanji kepada Allah atau kepada manusia (sesungguhnya janji itu pasti akan diminta pertanggungjawaban)nya.
t_id.iwq: Dan janganlah kamu mendekati harta anak yatim, kecuali dengan cara yang lebih baik (bermanfaat) sampai ia dewasa dan penuhilah janji; sesungguhnya janji itu pasti diminta pertanggungan jawabnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولا تقربوا مال اليتيم إلا بالتي هي أحسن حتى يبلغ أشده وأوفوا بالعهد» إذا عاهدتم الله أو الناس «إن العهد كان مسؤولا» عنه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَا تَقۡرَبُواْ مَالَ ٱلۡيَتِيمِ إِلَّا بِٱلَّتِي هِيَ أَحۡسَنُ حَتَّىٰ يَبۡلُغَ أَشُدَّهُۥۚ وَأَوۡفُواْ بِٱلۡعَهۡدِۖ إِنَّ ٱلۡعَهۡدَ كَانَ مَسۡـُٔولٗا (الْيَتِيمِ: مَنْ مَاتَ أَبُوهُ قَبْلَ البُلُوغِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kalian mendekati harta anak yatim kecuali dengan cara yang lebih baik/bermanfaat sampai ia dewasa dan penuhilah janji) jika kalian berjanji kepada Allah atau kepada manusia (sesungguhnya janji itu pasti akan diminta pertanggungjawaban)nya

ar: وَأَوۡفُوا۟ ٱلۡكَیۡلَ إِذَا كِلۡتُمۡ وَزِنُوا۟ بِٱلۡقِسۡطَاسِ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقِیمِۚ ذَ ٰلِكَ خَیۡرࣱ وَأَحۡسَنُ تَأۡوِیلࣰا
ar_simple: وأوفوا ٱلكیل إذا كلتم وزنوا بٱلقسطاس ٱلمستقیم ذ لك خیر وأحسن تأویلا

t.sahih-int: And give full measure when you measure, and weigh with an even balance. That is the best [way] and best in result
t.asad: And give full measure whenever you measure, and weigh with a balance that is true: this will be [for your own] good, and best in the end
t.yusuf-ali: Give full measure when ye measure, and weigh with a balance that is straight: that is the most fitting and the most advantageous in the final determination
t.pickthall: Fill the measure when ye measure, and weigh with a right balance; that is meet, and better in the end
t.arberry: And fill up the measure when you measure, and weigh with the straight balance; that is better and fairer in the issue
t.hilali-khan: And give full measure when you measure, and weigh with a balance that is straight. That is good (advantageous) and better in the end
t.itani: And give full measure when you measure, and weigh with accurate scales. That is fair, and the best determination.
t.mubarakpuri: And give full measure when you measure, and weigh with a balance that is straight. That is good (advantageous) and better in the end.
t.qarib: And whenever you measure, use accurate measurements and weigh with a level balance; this will be better and would be fairer
t.wahiduddin: Give full measure, when you measure, and weigh with accurate scales. That is fair, and better in the end
t.shakir: And give full measure when you measure out, and weigh with a true balance; this is fair and better in the end
t.haleem: Give full measure when you measure, and weigh with accurate scales: that is better and fairer in the end
t.maariful: And give full measure when you measure, and weigh with a straight balance. That is fair, and better at the end
t.khattab: Give in full when you measure, and weigh with an even balance. That is fairest and best in the end
t.ghali: And fill up the measure when you measure, and weigh with the straight equitableness; that is more charitable and fairest in interpretation (Or: determination, outcome)
t.irving: Give full measure whenever you measure out anything, and weigh with honest scales; that is better and the finest way of acting
t.iwq: And give full measure when you measure, and weigh with an even balance. That is the best way and best in result

t_id.kemenag: Dan sempurnakanlah takaran apabila kamu menakar, dan timbanglah dengan neraca yang benar. Itulah yang lebih utama (bagimu) dan lebih baik akibatnya.
t_id.sabiq: Sempurnakanlah takaran jika kalian menakar untuk pembeli. Timbanglah dengan neraca yang adil. Sesungguhnya menepati takaran dan timbangan lebih baik bagi kalian di dunia. Sebab hal itu dapat membuat orang senang bermuamalah dengan kalian. Sesungguhnya kesudahan yang paling baik adalah di akhirat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sempurnakanlah takaran) penuhilah dengan tepat (apabila kalian menakar dan timbanglah dengan neraca yang benar) timbangan yang tepat (itulah yang lebih utama dan lebih baik akibatnya.)
t_id.iwq: Dan sempurnakanlah takaran apabila kamu menakar, dan timbanglah dengan neraca yang benar. Itulah yang lebih utama (bagimu) dan lebih baik akibatnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأوْفوا الكيل» أتموه «إذا كلتم وزنوا بالقسطاس المستقيم» الميزان السوي «ذلك خير وأحسن تأويلاً» مآلاً
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَوۡفُواْ ٱلۡكَيۡلَ إِذَا كِلۡتُمۡ وَزِنُواْ بِٱلۡقِسۡطَاسِ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقِيمِۚ ذَٰلِكَ خَيۡرٞ وَأَحۡسَنُ تَأۡوِيلٗا (بِالقِسْطَاسِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ: بِالمِيزَانِ السَّوِيِّ, تَاوِيلًا: عَاقِبَةً عِنْدَ اللهِ فِي الآخِرَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sempurnakanlah takaran) penuhilah dengan tepat (apabila kalian menakar dan timbanglah dengan neraca yang benar) timbangan yang tepat (itulah yang lebih utama dan lebih baik akibatnya)

ar: وَلَا تَقۡفُ مَا لَیۡسَ لَكَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٌۚ إِنَّ ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَٱلۡبَصَرَ وَٱلۡفُؤَادَ كُلُّ أُو۟لَـٰۤئِكَ كَانَ عَنۡهُ مَسۡءُولࣰا
ar_simple: ولا تقف ما لیس لك به علم إن ٱلسمع وٱلبصر وٱلفؤاد كل أولئك كان عنه مسءولا

t.sahih-int: And do not pursue that of which you have no knowledge. Indeed, the hearing, the sight and the heart - about all those [one] will be questioned
t.asad: And never concern thyself with anything of which thou hast no knowledge: verily, [thy] hearing and sight and heart - all of them - will be called to account for it [on Judgment Day]
t.yusuf-ali: And pursue not that of which thou hast no knowledge; for every act of hearing, or of seeing or of (feeling in) the heart will be enquired into (on the Day of Reckoning)
t.pickthall: (O man), follow not that whereof thou hast no knowledge. Lo! the hearing and the sight and the heart - of each of these it will be asked
t.arberry: And pursue not that thou hast no knowledge of; the hearing, the sight, the heart -- all of those shall be questioned of
t.hilali-khan: And follow not (O man i.e., say not, or do not or witness not, etc.) that of which you have no knowledge (e.g. one's saying: "I have seen," while in fact he has not seen, or "I have heard," while he has not heard). Verily! The hearing, and the sight, and the heart, of each of those you will be questioned (by Allah)
t.itani: And do not occupy yourself with what you have no knowledge of. The hearing, and the sight, and the brains—all these will be questioned.
t.mubarakpuri: And follow not that of which you have no knowledge. Verily, the hearing, and the sight, and the heart of each of those ones will be questioned (by Allah).
t.qarib: And do not pursue matters about which you do not know anything: your hearing, sight and heart- all will be accounted for [on the Day of Judgment]
t.wahiduddin: Do not follow what you do not know; for the ear and the eye and the heart shall all be called to account
t.shakir: And follow not that of which you have not the knowledge; surely the hearing and the sight and the heart, all of these, shall be questioned about that
t.haleem: Do not follow blindly what you do not know to be true: ears, eyes, and heart, you will be questioned about all these
t.maariful: And do not follow a thing about which you have no knowledge. Surely, the ear, the eye and the heart - each one of them shall be interrogated about
t.khattab: Do not follow what you have no ˹sure˺ knowledge of. Indeed, all will be called to account for ˹their˺ hearing, sight, and intellect
t.ghali: And do not pursue what you have no knowledge of; surely hearing and beholding and heart-sight, (Or: perception) all of those will be questioned of
t.irving: Do not worry over something you have no knowledge about: your hearing, eyesight and vital organs will all be questioned concerning it
t.iwq: And do not pursue that of which you have no knowledge. Indeed, the hearing, the sight and the heart - about all those one will be questioned

t_id.kemenag: Dan janganlah kamu mengikuti apa yang kamu tidak mempunyai pengetahuan tentangnya. Sesungguhnya pendengaran, penglihatan dan hati, semuanya itu akan diminta pertanggungan jawabnya.
t_id.sabiq: Janganlah kalian ikuti, hai manusia, perkataan atau perbuatan yang kamu tidak ketahui. Jangan kamu ucapkan, "Aku telah mendengar," padahal sebenarnya kamu tidak mendengar; atau "Aku telah mengetahui," padahal kamu tidak mengetahui. Sesungguhnya, pada hari kiamat, nikmat yang berupa pendengaran, penglihatan dan hati akan dimintai pertanggungjawaban dari pemiliknya atas apa-apa yang telah diperbuatnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kamu mengikuti) menuruti (apa yang kami tidak mempunyai pengetahuan tentangnya. Sesungguhnya pendengaran, penglihatan dan hati) yakni kalbu (semuanya itu akan diminta pertanggungjawabannya) pemiliknya akan dimintai pertanggungjawabannya, yaitu apakah yang diperbuat dengannya?
t_id.iwq: Dan janganlah kamu mengikuti apa yang kamu tidak mempunyai pengetahuan tentangnya. Sesungguhnya pendengaran, penglihatan dan hati, semuanya itu akan diminta pertanggungan jawabnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولا تقفُ» تتبع «ما ليس لك به علم إن السمع والبصر والفؤاد» القلب «كل أولئك كان عنه مسؤولاً» صاحبه ماذا فعل به
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَا تَقۡفُ مَا لَيۡسَ لَكَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٌۚ إِنَّ ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَٱلۡبَصَرَ وَٱلۡفُؤَادَ كُلُّ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ كَانَ عَنۡهُ مَسۡـُٔولٗا (وَلَا تَقْفُ: لَا تَتْبَعْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kamu mengikuti) menuruti (apa yang kami tidak mempunyai pengetahuan tentangnya. Sesungguhnya pendengaran, penglihatan dan hati) yakni kalbu (semuanya itu akan diminta pertanggungjawabannya) pemiliknya akan dimintai pertanggungjawabannya, yaitu apakah yang diperbuat dengannya

ar: وَلَا تَمۡشِ فِی ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مَرَحًاۖ إِنَّكَ لَن تَخۡرِقَ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَلَن تَبۡلُغَ ٱلۡجِبَالَ طُولࣰا
ar_simple: ولا تمش فی ٱلأرض مرحا إنك لن تخرق ٱلأرض ولن تبلغ ٱلجبال طولا

t.sahih-int: And do not walk upon the earth exultantly. Indeed, you will never tear the earth [apart], and you will never reach the mountains in height
t.asad: And walk not on earth with haughty self-conceit: for, verily, thou canst never rend the earth asunder, nor canst thou ever grow as tall as the mountains
t.yusuf-ali: Nor walk on the earth with insolence: for thou canst not rend the earth asunder, nor reach the mountains in height
t.pickthall: And walk not in the earth exultant. Lo! thou canst not rend the earth, nor canst thou stretch to the height of the hills
t.arberry: And walk not in the earth exultantly; certainly thou wilt never tear the earth open, nor attain the mountains in height
t.hilali-khan: And walk not on the earth with conceit and arrogance. Verily, you can neither rend nor penetrate the earth, nor can you attain a stature like the mountains in height
t.itani: And do not walk proudly on earth. You can neither pierce the earth, nor can you match the mountains in height.
t.mubarakpuri: And walk not on the earth with conceit and arrogance. Verily, you can neither rend nor penetrate the earth nor can you attain a stature like the mountains in height.
t.qarib: Do not walk arrogantly about the earth; because, truthfully, you cannot tear up the earth or make yourself as tall as mountains
t.wahiduddin: Do not walk proudly on the earth. You cannot cleave the earth, nor can you rival the mountains in height
t.shakir: And do not go about in the land exultingly, for you cannot cut through the earth nor reach the mountains in height
t.haleem: Do not strut arrogantly about the earth: you cannot break it open, nor match the mountains in height
t.maariful: Do not walk on the earth in haughty style. You can neither tear the earth apart, nor can you match the mountains in height
t.khattab: And do not walk on the earth arrogantly. Surely you can neither crack the earth nor stretch to the height of the mountains
t.ghali: And do not walk in the earth merrily; surely you will never pierce the earth, and you will never reach the mountains in height
t.irving: Do not prance saucily around the earth; you can never tunnel through the earth nor rival the mountains in height
t.iwq: And do not walk upon the earth exultantly. Indeed, you will never tear the earth apart, and you will never reach the mountains in height

t_id.kemenag: Dan janganlah kamu berjalan di muka bumi ini dengan sombong, karena sesungguhnya kamu sekali-kali tidak dapat menembus bumi dan sekali-kali kamu tidak akan sampai setinggi gunung.
t_id.sabiq: Janganlah kamu berjalan di muka bumi dengan sombong dan merasa paling besar. Karena sungguh meskipun kamu melakukan kesombongan itu, sekeras-kerasnya hentakan kakimu tetap tidak akan bisa menembus bumi. Demikian pula, kendatipun kamu tinggikan dirimu tanda kesombongan, ketinggianmu itu tetap tidak akan sampai menyejajari tingginya puncak gunung.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kamu berjalan di muka bumi ini dengan sombong) artinya berjalan dengan sombong dan takabur (karena sesungguhnya kamu sekali-kali tidak dapat menembus bumi) melubanginya hingga sampai batas akhir bumi dengan ketakaburanmu itu (dan sekali-kali kamu tidak akan sampai setinggi gunung) maknanya bahwa sesungguhnya kamu tidak akan dapat mencapai hal tersebut, mengapa kamu bersikap sombong?
t_id.iwq: Dan janganlah kamu berjalan di muka bumi ini dengan sombong, karena sesungguhnya kamu sekali-kali tidak dapat menembus bumi dan sekali-kali kamu tidak akan sampai setinggi gunung.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولا تمش في الأرض مرحا» أي ذا مرح بالكبر والخيلاء «إنك لن تخرق الأرض» تثقبها حتى تبلغ آخرها بكبرك «ولن تبلغ الجبال طولاً» المعنى أنك لا تبلغ هذا المبلغ فكيف تختال
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَا تَمۡشِ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مَرَحًاۖ إِنَّكَ لَن تَخۡرِقَ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَلَن تَبۡلُغَ ٱلۡجِبَالَ طُولٗا (مَرَحًا: مُخْتالًا، مُتَكَبِّرًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kamu berjalan di muka bumi ini dengan sombong) artinya berjalan dengan sombong dan takabur (karena sesungguhnya kamu sekali-kali tidak dapat menembus bumi) melubanginya hingga sampai batas akhir bumi dengan ketakaburanmu itu (dan sekali-kali kamu tidak akan sampai setinggi gunung) maknanya bahwa sesungguhnya kamu tidak akan dapat mencapai hal tersebut, mengapa kamu bersikap sombong

ar: كُلُّ ذَ ٰلِكَ كَانَ سَیِّئُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّكَ مَكۡرُوهࣰا
ar_simple: كل ذ لك كان سیئه عند ربك مكروها

t.sahih-int: All that - its evil is ever, in the sight of your Lord, detested
t.asad: The evil of all this is odious in thy Sustainer's sight
t.yusuf-ali: Of all such things the evil is hateful in the sight of thy Lord
t.pickthall: The evil of all that is hateful in the sight of thy Lord
t.arberry: All of that -- the wickedness of it is hateful in the sight of thy Lord has revealed to thee
t.hilali-khan: All the bad aspects of these (the above mentioned things) are hateful to your Lord
t.itani: The evil of all these is disliked by your Lord.
t.mubarakpuri: All the bad aspects of these (the above mentioned things) are hateful to your Lord.
t.qarib: All of this is evil and detested in your Lord's sight
t.wahiduddin: All that is evil in the sight of your Lord, and is detestable
t.shakir: All this-- the evil of it-- is hateful in the sight of your Lord
t.haleem: The evil of all these actions is hateful to your Lord
t.maariful: That which is evil, of all these, is detestable in the sight of your Lord
t.khattab: The violation of any of these ˹commandments˺ is detestable to your Lord
t.ghali: All of that, the odiousness of it is hateful in the Meeting of your Lord
t.irving: All that is evil with your Lord, to be hated
t.iwq: All that - its evil is ever, in the sight of your Lord, detested

t_id.kemenag: Semua itu kejahatannya amat dibenci di sisi Tuhanmu.
t_id.sabiq: Semua wasiat yang disebut diatas merupakan keburukan yang dilarang dan sangat dibenci oleh Tuhanmu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Semua itu) hal telah disebutkan itu (Kejahatannya amat dibenci di sisi Rabbmu)
t_id.iwq: Semua itu kejahatannya amat dibenci di sisi Tuhanmu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كل ذلك» المذكور «كان سيِّئُهُ عند ربك مكروها»
tafsir.siraj-ar: كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ كَانَ سَيِّئُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّكَ مَكۡرُوهٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Semua itu) hal telah disebutkan itu (Kejahatannya amat dibenci di sisi Rabbmu)

ar: ذَ ٰلِكَ مِمَّاۤ أَوۡحَىٰۤ إِلَیۡكَ رَبُّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡحِكۡمَةِۗ وَلَا تَجۡعَلۡ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتُلۡقَىٰ فِی جَهَنَّمَ مَلُومࣰا مَّدۡحُورًا
ar_simple: ذ لك مما أوحى إلیك ربك من ٱلحكمة ولا تجعل مع ٱلله إلها ءاخر فتلقى فی جهنم ملوما مدحورا

t.sahih-int: That is from what your Lord has revealed to you, [O Muhammad], of wisdom. And, [O mankind], do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity, lest you be thrown into Hell, blamed and banished
t.asad: this is part of that knowledge of right and wrong with which thy Sustainer has inspired thee. Hence, do not set up any other deity side by side with God, lest thou be cast into hell, blamed [by thyself] and rejected [by Him]
t.yusuf-ali: These are among the (precepts of) wisdom, which thy Lord has revealed to thee. Take not, with Allah, another object of worship, lest thou shouldst be thrown into Hell, blameworthy and rejected
t.pickthall: This is (part) of that wisdom wherewith thy Lord hath inspired thee (O Muhammad). And set not up with Allah any other god, lest thou be cast into hell, reproved, abandoned
t.arberry: That is of the wisdom thy Lord set not up with God another god, or thou wilt be cast into Gehenna, reproached and rejected
t.hilali-khan: This is (part) of Al-Hikmah (wisdom, good manners and high character, etc.) which your Lord has inspired to you (O Muhammad SAW). And set not up with Allah any other ilah (god) lest you should be thrown into Hell, blameworthy and rejected, (from Allah's Mercy)
t.itani: That is some of the wisdom your Lord has revealed to you. Do not set up with God another god, or else you will be thrown in Hell, rebuked and banished.
t.mubarakpuri: This is (part) of Al-Hikmah (wisdom) which your Lord has revealed to you. And set not up with Allah any other god lest you should be thrown into Hell, blameworthy and rejected (from Allah's mercy).
t.qarib: This is part of the wisdom your Lord has revealed to you. So, do not equate any other deity with God, unless [you desire] to be thrown into Hell, self-condemned [by your actions] and rejected [by God]
t.wahiduddin: This is part of the wisdom that your Lord has revealed to you. Do not set up any other deity with God, lest you be cast into Hell, condemned and rejected
t.shakir: This is of what your Lord has revealed to you of wisdom, and do not associate any other god with Allah lest you should be thrown into hell, blamed, cast away
t.haleem: [Prophet], this is some of the wisdom your Lord has revealed to you: do not set up another god beside God, or you will be thrown into Hell, blamed and rejected
t.maariful: This is part of the Wisdom your Lord has revealed to you. And do not set up any other god along with Allah, lest you should be thrown into Jahannam , reproached, rejected
t.khattab: This is part of the wisdom which your Lord has revealed to you ˹O Prophet˺. And do not set up any other god with Allah ˹O humanity˺, or you will be cast into Hell, blameworthy, rejected
t.ghali: That is of (the) Wisdom your Lord has revealed to you; and do not make up with Allah another god, (or) then you will be cast in Hell blamed (and) rejected
t.irving: Such is some of the wisdom your Lord has revealed to you. Do not place any other deity alongside God [Alone] lest you be tossed into Hell, blamed, rejected
t.iwq: That is from what your Lord has revealed to you, O Muhammad, of wisdom. And, O mankind, do not make as equal with Allah another deity, lest you be thrown into Hell, blamed and banished

t_id.kemenag: Itulah sebagian hikmah yang diwahyukan Tuhanmu kepadamu. Dan janganlah kamu mengadakan tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, yang menyebabkan kamu dilemparkan ke dalam neraka dalam keadaan tercela lagi dijauhkan (dari rahmat Allah).
t_id.sabiq: Itulah sebagian wahyu Tuhan kepadamu, berupa pengetahuan yang benar tentang Zat Allah dan tentang kebaikan untuk dilaksanakan. Janganlah kamu menjadikan sekutu bagi Allah sehingga kamu dicampakkan ke dalam neraka jahanam dalam keadaan--baik dalam pandanganmu sendiri maupun dalam pandangan orang lain--terhina, binasa dan dijauhkan dari rahmat Tuhan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Itulah sebagian apa yang diwahyukan kepadamu) hai Muhammad (oleh Rabbmu yaitu berupa hikmah) pelajaran (Dan janganlah kamu mengadakan tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, yang menyebabkan kamu dilemparkan ke dalam neraka dalam keadaan tercela lagi dijauhkan) artinya dijauhkan dari rahmat Allah
t_id.iwq: Itulah sebagian hikmah yang diwahyukan Tuhanmu kepadamu. Dan janganlah kamu mengadakan tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, yang menyebabkan kamu dilemparkan ke dalam neraka dalam keadaan tercela lagi dijauhkan (dari rahmat Allah).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ذلك مما أوحى إليك» يا محمد «ربك من الحكمة» الموعظة «ولا تجعل مع الله إلها آخر فتلقى في جهنم ملوما مدحورا» مطرودا من رحمة الله
tafsir.siraj-ar: ذَٰلِكَ مِمَّآ أَوۡحَىٰٓ إِلَيۡكَ رَبُّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡحِكۡمَةِۗ وَلَا تَجۡعَلۡ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتُلۡقَىٰ فِي جَهَنَّمَ مَلُومٗا مَّدۡحُورًا (مَلُومًا: يَلُومُكَ النَّاسُ وَنَفْسُكَ, مَّدْحُورًا: مطَرْوُدًا مُبْعَدًا مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Itulah sebagian apa yang diwahyukan kepadamu) hai Muhammad (oleh Rabbmu yaitu berupa hikmah) pelajaran (Dan janganlah kamu mengadakan tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, yang menyebabkan kamu dilemparkan ke dalam neraka dalam keadaan tercela lagi dijauhkan) artinya dijauhkan dari rahmat Allah

ar: أَفَأَصۡفَىٰكُمۡ رَبُّكُم بِٱلۡبَنِینَ وَٱتَّخَذَ مِنَ ٱلۡمَلَـٰۤئِكَةِ إِنَـٰثًاۚ إِنَّكُمۡ لَتَقُولُونَ قَوۡلًا عَظِیمࣰا
ar_simple: أفأصفىكم ربكم بٱلبنین وٱتخذ من ٱلملئكة إنثا إنكم لتقولون قولا عظیما

t.sahih-int: Then, has your Lord chosen you for [having] sons and taken from among the angels daughters? Indeed, you say a grave saying
t.asad: HAS, THEN, your Sustainer distinguished you by [giving you] sons, and taken unto Himself daughters in the guise of angels? Verily, you are uttering a dreadful saying
t.yusuf-ali: Has then your Lord (O Pagans!) preferred for you sons, and taken for Himself daughters among the angels? Truly ye utter a most dreadful saying
t.pickthall: Hath your Lord then distinguished you (O men of Makka) by giving you sons, and hath chosen for Himself females from among the angels? Lo! verily ye speak an awful word
t.arberry: What, has your Lord favoured you with sons and taken to Himself from the angels females? Surely it is a monstrous thing you are saying
t.hilali-khan: Has then your Lord (O pagans of Makkah) preferred for you sons, and taken for Himself from among the angels daughters. Verily! You utter an awful saying, indeed
t.itani: Has your Lord favored you with sons, while choosing for Himself daughters from among the angels? You are indeed saying a terrible thing.
t.mubarakpuri: Has then your Lord preferred for you sons, and taken for Himself from among the angels daughters Verily, you indeed utter an awful saying.
t.qarib: Has your Lord chosen you to have sons, while He takes daughters from among the angels? What a grave thing for you to say
t.wahiduddin: What! Has your Lord then favoured you with sons and Himself adopted females from among the angels? What you say is monstrous
t.shakir: What! has then your Lord preferred to give you sons, and (for Himself) taken daughters from among the angels? Most surely you utter a grievous saying
t.haleem: What? Has your Lord favoured you people with sons and taken daughters for Himself from the angels?What a monstrous thing for you to say
t.maariful: Is it, then, that your Lord has chosen you people to have sons, and has Himself opted for females from among the angels? Surely, you are uttering a serious statement
t.khattab: Has your Lord favoured you ˹pagans˺ with sons and taken angels as ˹His˺ daughters? You are truly making an outrageous claim
t.ghali: Has your Lord then elected for you (only) sons and taken to Him from the Angels females? Surely you are indeed saying a monstrous saying
t.irving: Has your Lord singled you out to have sons, while He has accepted daughters from among the angels [for Himself]? You are uttering such a serious statement
t.iwq: Then, has your Lord chosen you for having sons and taken from among the angels daughters? Indeed, you say a grave saying

t_id.kemenag: Maka apakah patut Tuhan memilihkan bagimu anak-anak laki-laki sedang Dia sendiri mengambil anak-anak perempuan di antara para malaikat? Sesungguhnya kamu benar-benar mengucapkan kata-kata yang besar (dosanya).
t_id.sabiq: Allah mengingkari mereka yang mengatakan malaikat adalah anak perempuan-Nya. Dia berfirman, "Apakah Tuhan kalian lebih mengutamakan kalian daripada diri-Nya, sehingga mengkhususkan kalian dengan anak laki-laki yang kuat sementara Dia memilih malaikat sebagai anak perempuan-Nya seperti yang kalian anggap. Sesungguhnya dengan ucapan itu kalian telah melakukan dusta besar."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah patut telah memilihkan bagi kalian) telah mengkhususkan bagi kalian, hai penduduk Mekah (Rabb kalian akan anak-anak laki-laki sedangkan Dia sendiri mengambil anak-anak perempuan di antara para Malaikat) yakni sebagai anak-anak perempuan-Nya sesuai dengan dugaan kalian itu (Sesungguhnya kalian benar-benar mengucapkan) melalui perkataan kalian itu (kata-kata yang besar dosanya)
t_id.iwq: Maka apakah patut Tuhan memilihkan bagimu anak-anak laki-laki sedang Dia sendiri mengambil anak-anak perempuan di antara para malaikat? Sesungguhnya kamu benar-benar mengucapkan kata-kata yang besar (dosanya).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أفأصفاكم» أخلصكم يا أهل مكة «ربكم بالبنين واتخذ من الملائكة إناثا» بنات لنفسه بزعمكم «إنكم لتقولون» بذلك «قولاً عظيما»
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَفَأَصۡفَىٰكُمۡ رَبُّكُم بِٱلۡبَنِينَ وَٱتَّخَذَ مِنَ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنَٰثًاۚ إِنَّكُمۡ لَتَقُولُونَ قَوۡلًا عَظِيمٗا (أَفَأَصْفَاكُمْ: أَفَخَصَّكُمْ؟)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah patut telah memilihkan bagi kalian) telah mengkhususkan bagi kalian, hai penduduk Mekah (Rabb kalian akan anak-anak laki-laki sedangkan Dia sendiri mengambil anak-anak perempuan di antara para Malaikat) yakni sebagai anak-anak perempuan-Nya sesuai dengan dugaan kalian itu (Sesungguhnya kalian benar-benar mengucapkan) melalui perkataan kalian itu (kata-kata yang besar dosanya)

ar: وَلَقَدۡ صَرَّفۡنَا فِی هَـٰذَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ لِیَذَّكَّرُوا۟ وَمَا یَزِیدُهُمۡ إِلَّا نُفُورࣰا
ar_simple: ولقد صرفنا فی هذا ٱلقرءان لیذكروا وما یزیدهم إلا نفورا

t.sahih-int: And We have certainly diversified [the contents] in this Qur'an that mankind may be reminded, but it does not increase the disbelievers except in aversion
t.asad: And, indeed, many facets have We given [to Our message] in this Qur'an, so that they [who deny the truth] might take it to heart: but all this only increases their aversion
t.yusuf-ali: We have explained (things) in various (ways) in this Qur'an, in order that they may receive admonition, but it only increases their flight (from the Truth)
t.pickthall: We verily have displayed (Our warnings) in this Qur'an that they may take heed, but it increaseth them in naught save aversion
t.arberry: We have turned about in this Koran, that they may remember; and it increases them only in aversion
t.hilali-khan: And surely, We have explained [Our Promises, Warnings and (set forth many) examples] in this Quran that they (the disbelievers) may take heed, but it increases them in naught save aversion
t.itani: We have explained in this Quran in various ways, that they may remember, but it only adds to their rebellion.
t.mubarakpuri: And surely, We have explained in this Qur'an that they may take heed, but it increases them in naught save aversion.
t.qarib: We have made things clear in this Qur'an, so [that] those [who deny the truth] might take it to heart, but it is only making them more distant from the truth
t.wahiduddin: We have explained [the truth] in this Quran in various ways, so that they may take heed, but it has only increased their aversion
t.shakir: And certainly We have repeated (warnings) in this Quran that they may be mindful, but it does not add save to their aversion
t.haleem: We have explained things in various ways in this Quran, so that such people might take notice, but it has only turned them further away
t.maariful: Surely, We have explained things in various ways in this Qur’ān, so that they may pay heed to the advice; but it increases nothing in them except aversion
t.khattab: We have surely varied ˹the signs˺ in this Quran so perhaps they may be mindful, but it only drives them farther away
t.ghali: And indeed We have already propounded (i.e., Our warnings) in this Qur'an that they may constantly remember; and in no way does it increase them except in repulsion
t.irving: We have already spelled out matters in this Reading so they will notice it, even though it only adds to their disgust
t.iwq: And We have certainly diversified the contents in this Qur'an that mankind may be reminded, but it does not increase the disbelievers except in aversion

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya dalam Al Quran ini Kami telah ulang-ulangi (peringatan-peringatan), agar mereka selalu ingat. Dan ulangan peringatan itu tidak lain hanyalah menambah mereka lari (dari kebenaran).
t_id.sabiq: Telah Kami jelaskan dalam al-Qur'ân ini dengan sebaik-baiknya beberapa permisalan, nasihat dan hukum, agar orang-orang musyrik manjadikannya pelajaran. Akan tetapi karena hati mereka telah beku, penjelasan itu hanya semakin membuat mereka jauh dari kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami jelaskan) kami terangkan (di dalam Alquran ini) misal-misal, janji dan ancaman (agar mereka selalu ingat) maksudnya mengambil pelajaran darinya (Akan tetapi tidak menambahkan kepada mereka) hal tersebut (melainkan hanya menambah mereka lari) dari perkara yang hak
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya dalam Al Al-Quran ini Kami telah ulang-ulangi (peringatan-peringatan), agar mereka selalu ingat. Dan ulangan peringatan itu tidak lain hanyalah menambah mereka lari (dari kebenaran).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد صرفنا» بينا «في هذا القرآن» من الأمثال والوعد والوعيد «ليذكروا» يتعظوا «وما يزيدهم» ذلك «إلا نفروا» عن الحق
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ صَرَّفۡنَا فِي هَٰذَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ لِيَذَّكَّرُواْ وَمَا يَزِيدُهُمۡ إِلَّا نُفُورٗا (صَرَّفْنَا: نَوَّعْنَا الأَسَالِيبَ، وَوَضَّحْنَاهَا, نُفُورًا: بُعْدًا عَنِ الحَقِّ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami jelaskan) kami terangkan (di dalam Alquran ini) misal-misal, janji dan ancaman (agar mereka selalu ingat) maksudnya mengambil pelajaran darinya (Akan tetapi tidak menambahkan kepada mereka) hal tersebut (melainkan hanya menambah mereka lari) dari perkara yang hak

ar: قُل لَّوۡ كَانَ مَعَهُۥۤ ءَالِهَةࣱ كَمَا یَقُولُونَ إِذࣰا لَّٱبۡتَغَوۡا۟ إِلَىٰ ذِی ٱلۡعَرۡشِ سَبِیلࣰا
ar_simple: قل لو كان معه ءالهة كما یقولون إذا لٱبتغوا إلى ذی ٱلعرش سبیلا

t.sahih-int: Say, [O Muhammad], "If there had been with Him [other] gods, as they say, then they [each] would have sought to the Owner of the Throne a way
t.asad: Say: "If there were-as some people assert [other] deities side by side with Him, surely [even] they would have to strive to find a way unto Him who is enthroned on His almightiness
t.yusuf-ali: Say: If there had been (other) gods with Him, as they say,- behold, they would certainly have sought out a way to the Lord of the Throne
t.pickthall: Say (O Muhammad, to the disbelievers): If there were other gods along with Him, as they say, then had they sought a way against the Lord of the Throne
t.arberry: Say: 'If there had been other gods with Him, as they say, in that case assuredly they would have sought a way unto the Lord of the Throne.' Glory be to Him
t.hilali-khan: Say (O Muhammad SAW to these polytheists, pagans, etc.): "If there had been other aliha (gods) along with Him as they assert, then they would certainly have sought out a way to the Lord of the Throne (seeking His Pleasures and to be near to Him)
t.itani: Say, “If there were other gods with Him, as they say, they would have sought a way to the Lord of the Throne.”
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "If there had been other gods along with Him as they assert, then they would certainly have sought out a way to the Lord of the Throne.
t.qarib: Say, "If there had been, as they say, other gods with Him, certainly they would have sought a way to the Lord of the Throne
t.wahiduddin: Say, "If there were [other] deities along with Him, as they claim, then they would surely have tried to find a way to the Lord of the Throne
t.shakir: Say: If there were with Him gods as they say, then certainly they would have been able to seek a way to the Lord of power
t.haleem: Say, ‘If there were other gods along with Him, as they say there are, then they would have tried to find a way to the Lord of the Throne.’
t.maariful: Say, “Had there been other gods along with Him”, as they say, “then they would have found out a way to the Lord of the Throne”
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “Had there been other gods besides Him—as they claim—then they would have certainly sought a way to ˹challenge˺ the Lord of the Throne.”
t.ghali: Say, "If there had been (other) gods with Him, as they say, lo, indeed they would have constantly sought a way to The Owner of the Throne
t.irving: SAY: "If there were (other) gods along with Him as they say, then they would have sought a way to the Possessor of the Throne
t.iwq: Say, O Muhammad, "If there had been with Him other gods, as they say, then they each would have sought to the Owner of the Throne a way

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Jikalau ada tuhan-tuhan di samping-Nya, sebagaimana yang mereka katakan, niscaya tuhan-tuhan itu mencari jalan kepada Tuhan yang mempunyai 'Arsy".
t_id.sabiq: Untuk mengungkapkan kepalsuan tuduhan bahwa Allah mempunyai sekutu, katakanlah, wahai Nabi, "Andaikata ada tuhan-tuhan selain Allah sebagaimana yang mereka katakan, niscaya sekutu-sekutu itu akan mencari jalan menuju Tuhan yang mutlak untuk menyaingi-Nya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) kepada mereka ("Jikalau ada di samping-Nya) yakni di samping Allah (tuhan-tuhan lain sebagaimana yang mereka katakan, niscaya tuhan-tuhan itu mencari) mencari-cari (kepada Tuhan Yang mempunyai Arasy) yakni Allah (jalan) untuk memerangi-Nya
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Jikalau ada tuhan-tuhan di samping-Nya, sebagaimana yang mereka katakan, niscaya tuhan-tuhan itu mencari jalan kepada Tuhan yang mempunyai 'Arsy".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل» لهم «لو كان معه» أي الله «آلهة كما يقولون إذا لابتغوْا» طلبوا «إلى ذي العرش» أي الله «سبيلاً» ليقاتلوه
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُل لَّوۡ كَانَ مَعَهُۥٓ ءَالِهَةٞ كَمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذٗا لَّٱبۡتَغَوۡاْ إِلَىٰ ذِي ٱلۡعَرۡشِ سَبِيلٗا (لَّابْتَغَوْا: لَطَلَبُوا, ذِي الْعَرْشِ: صَاحِبِ العَرْشِ، وَهُوَ اللهُ تَعَالَى, سَبِيلًا: طَريقًا لِمُغَالَبَتِهِ، أَوْ لَابْتَغَوْا طَرِيقًا إلَى اللهِ؛ بِالعِبَادَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) kepada mereka ("Jikalau ada di samping-Nya) yakni di samping Allah (tuhan-tuhan lain sebagaimana yang mereka katakan, niscaya tuhan-tuhan itu mencari) mencari-cari (kepada Tuhan Yang mempunyai Arasy) yakni Allah (jalan) untuk memerangi-Nya

ar: سُبۡحَـٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَـٰلَىٰ عَمَّا یَقُولُونَ عُلُوࣰّا كَبِیرࣰا
ar_simple: سبحنه وتعلى عما یقولون علوا كبیرا

t.sahih-int: Exalted is He and high above what they say by great sublimity
t.asad: Limitless is He in His glory, and sublimely, immeasurably exalted above anything that men may say [about Him]
t.yusuf-ali: Glory to Him! He is high above all that they say!- Exalted and Great (beyond measure)
t.pickthall: Glorified is He, and High Exalted above what they say
t.arberry: High indeed be He exalted above that they say
t.hilali-khan: Glorified and High be He! From 'Uluwan Kabira (the great falsehood) that they say! (i.e. forged statements that there are other gods along with Allah, but He is Allah, the One, the Self-Sufficient Master, whom all creatures need. He begets not, nor was He begotten, and there is none comparable or coequal unto Him)
t.itani: Be He glorified. He is exalted, far above what they say.
t.mubarakpuri: Glorified and Exalted is He high above what they say!
t.qarib: May He be exalted in His glory, far above what they say in greatness and sublimity
t.wahiduddin: Glory be to Him! Exalted above all that they say
t.shakir: Glory be to Him and exalted be He in high exaltation above what they say
t.haleem: Glory to Him! He is far above what they say
t.maariful: Pure is He, and Exalted, immensely above what they say
t.khattab: Glorified and Highly Exalted is He above what they claim
t.ghali: All Extolment be to Him and Supremely Exalted be He above whatever they say, by a great exaltation
t.irving: Glory be to Him! How greatly Exalted is He over anything they may say
t.iwq: Exalted is He and high above what they say by great sublimity

t_id.kemenag: Maha Suci dan Maha Tinggi Dia dari apa yang mereka katakan dengan ketinggian yang sebesar-besarnya.
t_id.sabiq: Mahasuci Allah dengan kesucian yang pantas bagi-Nya dan Mahatinggi Dia dari apa yang mereka tuduhkan bahwa ada tuhan selain diri-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maha Suci) ungkapan untuk memahasucikan-Nya (dan Maha Tinggi Dia dari apa yang mereka katakan) dari dakwaan sekutu-sekutu itu (dengan ketinggian yang sebesar-besarnya).
t_id.iwq: Maha Suci dan Maha Tinggi Dia dari apa yang mereka katakan dengan ketinggian yang sebesar-besarnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «سبحانه» تنزيها له «وتعالى عما يقولون» من الشركاء «علوا كبيرا»
tafsir.siraj-ar: سُبۡحَٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يَقُولُونَ عُلُوّٗا كَبِيرٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maha Suci) ungkapan untuk memahasucikan-Nya (dan Maha Tinggi Dia dari apa yang mereka katakan) dari dakwaan sekutu-sekutu itu (dengan ketinggian yang sebesar-besarnya)

ar: تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَ ٰتُ ٱلسَّبۡعُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَمَن فِیهِنَّۚ وَإِن مِّن شَیۡءٍ إِلَّا یُسَبِّحُ بِحَمۡدِهِۦ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تَفۡقَهُونَ تَسۡبِیحَهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ حَلِیمًا غَفُورࣰا
ar_simple: تسبح له ٱلسمو ت ٱلسبع وٱلأرض ومن فیهن وإن من شیء إلا یسبح بحمده ولكن لا تفقهون تسبیحهم إنه كان حلیما غفورا

t.sahih-int: The seven heavens and the earth and whatever is in them exalt Him. And there is not a thing except that it exalts [Allah] by His praise, but you do not understand their [way of] exalting. Indeed, He is ever Forbearing and Forgiving
t.asad: The seven heavens extol His limitless glory, and the earth, and all that they contain; and there is not a single thing but extols His limitless glory and praise: but you [O men] fail to grasp the manner of their glorifying Him! Verily, He is forbearing, much-forgiving
t.yusuf-ali: The seven heavens and the earth, and all beings therein, declare His glory: there is not a thing but celebrates His praise; And yet ye understand not how they declare His glory! Verily He is Oft-Forbear, Most Forgiving
t.pickthall: The seven heavens and the earth and all that is therein praise Him, and there is not a thing but hymneth His praise; but ye understand not their praise. Lo! He is ever Clement, Forgiving
t.arberry: The seven heavens and the earth, and whosoever in them is, extol Him; nothing is, that does not proclaim His praise, but you do not understand their extolling. Surely He is All-clement, All-forgiving
t.hilali-khan: The seven heavens and the earth and all that is therein, glorify Him and there is not a thing but glorifies His Praise. But you understand not their glorification. Truly, He is Ever Forbearing, Oft-Forgiving
t.itani: Praising Him are the seven heavens, and the earth, and everyone in them. There is not a thing that does not glorify Him with praise, but you do not understand their praises. He is indeed Forbearing and Forgiving.
t.mubarakpuri: The seven heavens and the earth and all that is therein, glorify Him and there is not a thing but glorifies His praise. But you understand not their glorification. Truly, He is Ever Forbearing, Oft-Forgiving.
t.qarib: The seven heavens and the earth, and everyone in them declare His glory. There is nothing which does not glorify Him with praise, but you humans fail to understand the manner of their glorification. He is All-Forbearing, Most-Forgiving
t.wahiduddin: The seven heavens and the earth and all who dwell therein glorify Him. There is not a single thing but glorifies Him with His praise; but you do not understand their glorification. Truly, He is forbearing and most forgiving
t.shakir: The seven heavens declare His glory and the earth (too), and those who are in them; and there is not a single thing but glorifies Him with His praise, but you do not understand their glorification; surely He is Forbearing, Forgiving
t.haleem: The seven heavens and the earth and everyone in them glorify Him. There is not a single thing that does not celebrate His praise, though you do not understand their praise: He is most forbearing, most forgiving
t.maariful: All the seven skies and the earth and all those therein extol His purity. And there is not a single thing that does not extol His purity along with His praise, but you do not understand their extolling. Surely He is Forbearing, Most-Forgiving
t.khattab: The seven heavens, the earth, and all those in them glorify Him. There is not a single thing that does not glorify His praises—but you ˹simply˺ cannot comprehend their glorification. He is indeed Most Forbearing, All-Forgiving
t.ghali: The seven heavens and the earth and whoever is in them extol to Him, and decidedly not a thing (is) except that it extols His praise, but you do not comprehend their Extolment. Surely He has been Ever-Forbearing, Ever-Forgiving
t.irving: The Seven Heavens and Earth, as well as whoever is in them, glorify Him. Nothing exists unless it hymns His praise; yet you do not understand their glorification. Still He has been Lenient, Forgiving
t.iwq: The seven heavens and the earth and whatever is in them exalt Him. And there is not a thing except that it exalts Allah by His praise, but you do not understand their way of exalting. Indeed, He is ever Forbearing and Forgiving

t_id.kemenag: Langit yang tujuh, bumi dan semua yang ada di dalamnya bertasbih kepada Allah. Dan tak ada suatupun melainkan bertasbih dengan memuji-Nya, tetapi kamu sekalian tidak mengerti tasbih mereka. Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Maha Penyantun lagi Maha Pengampun.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya langit yang tujuh, bumi, dan semua makhluk yang ada di dalamnya selalu menyucikan- Nya dan menjadi bukti--karena kecermatan ciptaan-Nya itu--bahwa kerajaan Allah amatlah sempurna, jauh dari segala kekurangan dan bahwa tidak ada sekutu bagi-Nya. Semua makhluk yang ada di kerajaan-Nya yang luas itu, tanpa terkecuali, selalu menyucikan dan memuji-Nya. Akan tetapi orang-orang kafir tidak memahami bukti-bukti ini karena kalbu mereka telah lengah. Allah Maha Penyantun terhadap mereka lagi Maha Pengampun bagi orang yang bertobat sehingga tidak menyegerakan hukuman.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Bertasbih kepada-Nya) memahasucikan-Nya (langit yang tujuh, bumi dan semua yang ada di dalamnya. Dan tak ada) tiada (suatu pun) di antara semua makhluk (melainkan bertasbih) seraya (memuji kepada-Nya) artinya mereka selalu mengucapkan kalimat subhaanallaah wa bihamdihi (tetapi kalian tidak mengerti) tidak memahami (tasbih mereka) karena hal itu dilakukan bukan memakai bahasa kalian. (Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Maha Penyantun lagi Maha Pengampun) karena itu Dia tidak menyegerakan azab-Nya kepada kalian, bila kalian berbuat durhaka.
t_id.iwq: Langit yang tujuh, bumi dan semua yang ada di dalamnya bertasbih kepada Allah. Dan tak ada suatupun melainkan bertasbih dengan memuji-Nya, tetapi kamu sekalian tidak mengerti tasbih mereka. Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Maha Penyantun lagi Maha Pengampun.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «تسبح له» تنزهه «السماوات السبع والأرض ومن فيهن وإن» ما «من شيء» من المخلوقات «إلا يسبح» متلبسا «بحمده» أي يقول سبحان الله وبحمده «ولكن لا تفقهون» تفهمون «تسبيحهم» لأنه ليس بلغتكم «إنه كان حليما غفورا» حيث لم يعاجلكم بالعقوبة
tafsir.siraj-ar: تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ ٱلسَّبۡعُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَمَن فِيهِنَّۚ وَإِن مِّن شَيۡءٍ إِلَّا يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمۡدِهِۦ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تَفۡقَهُونَ تَسۡبِيحَهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ حَلِيمًا غَفُورٗا (يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدَهِ: يُنَزِّهُهُ تَنْزِيهًا مَقْرُونًا بِالثَّنَاءِ، وَالحَمْدِ لِلهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Bertasbih kepada-Nya) memahasucikan-Nya (langit yang tujuh, bumi dan semua yang ada di dalamnya. Dan tak ada) tiada (suatu pun) di antara semua makhluk (melainkan bertasbih) seraya (memuji kepada-Nya) artinya mereka selalu mengucapkan kalimat subhaanallaah wa bihamdihi (tetapi kalian tidak mengerti) tidak memahami (tasbih mereka) karena hal itu dilakukan bukan memakai bahasa kalian. (Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Maha Penyantun lagi Maha Pengampun) karena itu Dia tidak menyegerakan azab-Nya kepada kalian, bila kalian berbuat durhaka

ar: وَإِذَا قَرَأۡتَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ جَعَلۡنَا بَیۡنَكَ وَبَیۡنَ ٱلَّذِینَ لَا یُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱلۡءَاخِرَةِ حِجَابࣰا مَّسۡتُورࣰا
ar_simple: وإذا قرأت ٱلقرءان جعلنا بینك وبین ٱلذین لا یؤمنون بٱلءاخرة حجابا مستورا

t.sahih-int: And when you recite the Qur'an, We put between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter a concealed partition
t.asad: But [thus it is:] whenever thou recitest the Qur'an, We place an invisible barrier between thee and those who will not believe in the life to come
t.yusuf-ali: When thou dost recite the Qur'an, We put, between thee and those who believe not in the Hereafter, a veil invisible
t.pickthall: And when thou recitest the Qur'an we place between thee and those who believe not in the Hereafter a hidden barrier
t.arberry: When thou recitest the Koran, We place between thee, and those who do not believe in the world to come, a curtain obstructing
t.hilali-khan: And when you (Muhammad SAW) recite the Quran, We put between you and those who believe not in the Hereafter, an invisible veil (or screen their hearts, so they hear or understand it not)
t.itani: When you read the Quran, We place between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter an invisible barrier.
t.mubarakpuri: And when you recite the Qur'an, We put between you and those who believe not in the Hereafter, an invisible veil.
t.qarib: And so it is [that] whenever you recite the Qur'an, We place an invisible veil between you and those who do not believe in the life Hereafter
t.wahiduddin: When you recite the Quran, We place an invisible barrier between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter
t.shakir: And when you recite the Quran, We place between you and those who do not believe in the hereafter a hidden barrier
t.haleem: [Prophet], when you recite the Quran, We put an invisible barrier between you and those who do not believe in the life to come
t.maariful: When you recite the Qur’ān, We place an invisible curtain between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter
t.khattab: When you ˹O Prophet˺ recite the Quran, We put a hidden barrier between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter
t.ghali: And when you read the Qur'an, We make between you and the ones who do not believe in the Hereafter a screened curtain
t.irving: Whenever you read the Quran, We place a hidden curtain between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter
t.iwq: And when you recite the Qur'an, We put between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter a concealed partition

t_id.kemenag: Dan apabila kamu membaca Al Quran niscaya Kami adakan antara kamu dan orang-orang yang tidak beriman kepada kehidupan akhirat, suatu dinding yang tertutup,
t_id.sabiq: Wahai Nabi, apabila kamu membaca al-Qur'ân yang mengandung bukti-bukti kebenaran, maka Kami akan menjadikan di antara kamu dengan orang-orang yang tidak beriman kepada hari kebangkitan dan pembalasan--ketika mereka ingin membunuhmu--sebuah hijab yang menutupi kamu dari mereka, sehingga mereka tidak melihatmu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila kalian membaca Alquran niscaya Kami adakan antara kamu dan orang-orang yang tidak beriman kepada kehidupan akhirat suatu dinding yang tertutup rapat) artinya Kami menjadikan penutup yang rapat bagimu dari mereka sehingga mereka tidak dapat melihatmu. Ayat ini diturunkan berkenaan dengan orang-orang musyrik yang hendak membunuh Nabi saw.
t_id.iwq: Dan apabila kamu membaca Al Al-Quran niscaya Kami adakan antara kamu dan orang-orang yang tidak beriman kepada kehidupan akhirat, suatu dinding yang tertutup,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإذا قرأت القرآن جعلنا بينك وبين الذين لا يؤمنون بالآخرة حجابا مستورا» أي ساترا لك عنهم فلا يرونك، نزل فيمن أراد الفتك به صلى الله عليه وسلم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِذَا قَرَأۡتَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ جَعَلۡنَا بَيۡنَكَ وَبَيۡنَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ حِجَابٗا مَّسۡتُورٗا (مَّسْتُورًا: سَاتِرًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila kalian membaca Alquran niscaya Kami adakan antara kamu dan orang-orang yang tidak beriman kepada kehidupan akhirat suatu dinding yang tertutup rapat) artinya Kami menjadikan penutup yang rapat bagimu dari mereka sehingga mereka tidak dapat melihatmu. Ayat ini diturunkan berkenaan dengan orang-orang musyrik yang hendak membunuh Nabi saw

ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمۡ أَكِنَّةً أَن یَفۡقَهُوهُ وَفِیۤ ءَاذَانِهِمۡ وَقۡرࣰاۚ وَإِذَا ذَكَرۡتَ رَبَّكَ فِی ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ وَحۡدَهُۥ وَلَّوۡا۟ عَلَىٰۤ أَدۡبَـٰرِهِمۡ نُفُورࣰا
ar_simple: وجعلنا على قلوبهم أكنة أن یفقهوه وفی ءاذانهم وقرا وإذا ذكرت ربك فی ٱلقرءان وحده ولوا على أدبرهم نفورا

t.sahih-int: And We have placed over their hearts coverings, lest they understand it, and in their ears deafness. And when you mention your Lord alone in the Qur'an, they turn back in aversion
t.asad: for, over their hearts We have laid veils which prevent them from grasping its purport, and into their ears, deafness. And so, whenever thou dost mention, while reciting the Qur'an, thy Sustainer as the one and only Divine Being, they turn their backs [upon thee] in aversion
t.yusuf-ali: And We put coverings over their hearts (and minds) lest they should understand the Qur'an, and deafness into their ears: when thou dost commemorate thy Lord and Him alone in the Qur'an, they turn on their backs, fleeing (from the Truth)
t.pickthall: And We place upon their hearts veils lest they should understand it, and in their ears a deafness; and when thou makest mention of thy Lord alone in the Qur'an, they turn their backs in aversion
t.arberry: and We lay veils upon their hearts lest they understand it, and in their ears heaviness. And when thou mentionest thy Lord only in the Koran, they turn in their traces in aversion
t.hilali-khan: And We have put coverings over their hearts lest, they should understand it (the Quran), and in their ears deafness. And when you make mention of your Lord Alone [La ilaha ill-Allah (none has the right to be worshipped but Allah) Islamic Monotheism] in the Quran, they turn on their backs, fleeing in extreme dislikeness
t.itani: And We drape veils over their hearts, preventing them from understanding it, and heaviness in their ears. And when you mention your Lord alone in the Quran, they turn their backs in aversion.
t.mubarakpuri: And We have put Akinnah over their hearts, lest they should understand it, and in their ears deafness. And when you make mention of your Lord Alone in the Qur'an, they turn on their backs, fleeing in extreme dislike.
t.qarib: for We have veiled their hearts to prevent them from understanding the meaning, and We have made their ears deaf. So, whenever you mention your Lord alone while you are reciting the Qur'an, they turn away in disdain
t.wahiduddin: We put veils over their hearts to prevent them from comprehending it, and We afflict their ears with deafness. When you mention your one and only Lord in your recitation of the Quran, they turn their backs in aversion
t.shakir: And We have placed coverings on their hearts and a heaviness in their ears lest they understand it, and when you mention your Lord alone in the Quran they turn their backs in aversion
t.haleem: We have put covers on their hearts that prevent them from understanding it, and heaviness in their ears. When you mention your Lord in the Quran, and Him alone, they turn their backs and run away
t.maariful: and We put covers on their hearts barring them from understanding it, and (We put) deafness in their ears; and when you refer to your Lord alone (without referring to their presumed deities,) in the Qur’ān, they turn their backs in aversion
t.khattab: We have cast veils over their hearts—leaving them unable to comprehend it—and deafness in their ears. And when you mention your Lord alone in the Quran, they turn their backs in aversion
t.ghali: And We make lids upon their hearts so that they could not comprehend it, and (we make) in their ears an obstruction. And when you mention your Lord alone in the Qur'an, they turn their backs in repulsion
t.irving: We place wrappers over their hearts lest they comprehend it, and dullness in their ears. When you mention your Lord Alone in the Quran they even turn their backs in disgust
t.iwq: And We have placed over their hearts coverings, lest they understand it, and in their ears deafness. And when you mention your Lord alone in the Qur'an, they turn back in aversion

t_id.kemenag: dan Kami adakan tutupan di atas hati mereka dan sumbatan di telinga mereka, agar mereka tidak dapat memahaminya. Dan apabila kamu menyebut Tuhanmu saja dalam Al Quran, niscaya mereka berpaling ke belakang karena bencinya,
t_id.sabiq: Kami jadikan, sesuai dengan kebijakan Kami dalam memberi petunjuk dan kesesatan, penutup dalam kalbu mereka sehingga mereka tidak ingin memahami hakikat al-Qur'ân. Pada telinga mereka terdapat penyumbat sehingga mereka tidak dapat mendengarkan dan tidak dapat mengambil manfaat. Yang demikian itu karena mereka membangkang dan menyombongkan diri secara berlebih-lebihan. Apabila kamu hanya menyebut Tuhanmu saja di dalam al-Qur'ân, tanpa menyebut tuhan-tuhan mereka, mereka berbalik menghindar agar tidak mendengarkannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami adakan tutupan di atas hati mereka) yakni penutup-penutup (agar mereka tidak dapat memahaminya) yakni Alquran; oleh karenanya mereka tidak dapat mengerti tentang isinya (dan di telinga mereka sumbatan) menyumbat sehingga mereka tidak dapat mendengarkannya (Dan apabila kamu menyebut Rabbmu saja dalam Alquran niscaya mereka berpaling ke belakang karena bencinya) kebencian mereka terhadap-Nya.
t_id.iwq: dan Kami adakan tutupan di atas hati mereka dan sumbatan di telinga mereka, agar mereka tidak dapat memahaminya. Dan apabila kamu menyebut Tuhanmu saja dalam Al Al-Quran, niscaya mereka berpaling ke belakang karena bencinya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وجعلنا على قلوبهم أكنة» أغطية «أن يفقهوه» من أن يفهموا القرآن أي فلا يفهمونه «وفي آذانهم وقرا» ثقلاً فلا يسمعونه «وإذا ذكرت ربك في القرآن وحده ولَّوا على أدبارهم نفورا» عنه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمۡ أَكِنَّةً أَن يَفۡقَهُوهُ وَفِيٓ ءَاذَانِهِمۡ وَقۡرٗاۚ وَإِذَا ذَكَرۡتَ رَبَّكَ فِي ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ وَحۡدَهُۥ وَلَّوۡاْ عَلَىٰٓ أَدۡبَٰرِهِمۡ نُفُورٗا (أَكِنَّةً: أَغْطِيَةً, وَقْرًا: صَمَمًا وَثِقَلًا فِي السَّمْعِ, نُفُورًا: نَافِرِينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami adakan tutupan di atas hati mereka) yakni penutup-penutup (agar mereka tidak dapat memahaminya) yakni Alquran; oleh karenanya mereka tidak dapat mengerti tentang isinya (dan di telinga mereka sumbatan) menyumbat sehingga mereka tidak dapat mendengarkannya (Dan apabila kamu menyebut Rabbmu saja dalam Alquran niscaya mereka berpaling ke belakang karena bencinya) kebencian mereka terhadap-Nya

ar: نَّحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا یَسۡتَمِعُونَ بِهِۦۤ إِذۡ یَسۡتَمِعُونَ إِلَیۡكَ وَإِذۡ هُمۡ نَجۡوَىٰۤ إِذۡ یَقُولُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ إِن تَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا رَجُلࣰا مَّسۡحُورًا
ar_simple: نحن أعلم بما یستمعون به إذ یستمعون إلیك وإذ هم نجوى إذ یقول ٱلظلمون إن تتبعون إلا رجلا مسحورا

t.sahih-int: We are most knowing of how they listen to it when they listen to you and [of] when they are in private conversation, when the wrongdoers say, "You follow not but a man affected by magic
t.asad: We are fully aware of what they are listening for when they listen to thee: for when they are secluded among themselves, lo! these wrongdoers say [unto one another], "If you were to follow [Muhammad, you would follow] only a man bewitched
t.yusuf-ali: We know best why it is they listen, when they listen to thee; and when they meet in private conference, behold, the wicked say, "Ye follow none other than a man bewitched
t.pickthall: We are Best Aware of what they wish to hear when they give ear to thee and when they take secret counsel, when the evil-doers say: Ye follow but a man bewitched
t.arberry: We know very well how they listen when they listen to thee, and when they conspire, when the evildoers say, 'You are only following a man bewitched
t.hilali-khan: We know best of what they listen to, when they listen to you. And when they take secret counsel, behold, the Zalimun (polytheists and wrong-doers, etc.) say: "You follow none but a bewitched man
t.itani: We know well what they listen to, when they listen to you, as they conspire, when the wrongdoers say, “You only follow a man bewitched.”
t.mubarakpuri: We know best of what they listen to, when they listen to you. And when they take secret counsel, then the wrongdoers say: "You follow none but a bewitched man."
t.qarib: We know best why they listen when they listen to you, for when they are in private these unjust people say [to one another]: "You follow only a man bewitched
t.wahiduddin: We are fully aware of what they wish to hear when they listen to you; and what they say when they converse in private; and when the wrongdoers say, "You are only following a man who is bewitched
t.shakir: We know best what they listen to when they listen to you, and when they take counsel secretly, when the unjust say: You follow only a man deprived of reason
t.haleem: We know best the way they listen, when they listen to you and when they confer in secret, and these wrongdoers say, ‘You are only following a man who is bewitched.’
t.maariful: We are fully aware of the reason for which they listen, when they listen to you, and when they are in secret consultation: when the transgressors say, “You are following none but a bewitched man.”
t.khattab: We know best how they listen to your recitation and what they say privately—when the wrongdoers say, “You would only be following a bewitched man.”
t.ghali: We know best what (intention) it is that they listen with as they listen to you, and as they have private conferences, as the unjust (of them) say, "Decidedly you are following (none) except a man bewitched
t.irving: We are quite Aware as to what they are listening for when they listen to you, and whenever they conspire together, then wrongdoers will say: "You are only following a man who is bewitched
t.iwq: We are most knowing of how they listen to it when they listen to you and of when they are in private conversation, when the wrongdoers say, "You follow not but a man affected by magic

t_id.kemenag: Kami lebih mengetahui dalam keadaan bagaimana mereka mendengarkan sewaktu mereka mendengarkan kamu, dan sewaktu mereka berbisik-bisik (yaitu) ketika orang-orang zalim itu berkata: "Kamu tidak lain hanyalah mengikuti seorang laki-laki yang kena sihir".
t_id.sabiq: Kami lebih mengetahui bagaimana mereka mendengarkan al-Qur'ân disertai dengan cemoohan dan hinaan ketika mendengarnya darimu. Mereka berbisik-bisik sesama mereka secara rahasia tentang hal itu. Yaitu ketika, secara diam-diam, orang-orang zalim saling mengatakan, "Jika kalian mengikutinya, maka sesungguhnya kalian telah mengikuti orang yang tersihir."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kami lebih mengetahui dalam keadaan bagaimana mereka mendengarkan) karena mereka memperolok-olokkanmu (sewaktu mereka mendengarkan kamu) sewaktu mendengarkan bacaan Alquranmu (dan sewaktu berbisik-bisik) di antara sesama mereka (yaitu ketika) kata idz di sini menjadi badal daripada kata idz yang sebelumnya (orang-orang zalim itu berkata) di dalam bisikan-bisikan mereka ("Tiada lain) tidak lain (orang yang kalian ikuti ini hanyalah seorang laki-laki yang kena sihir.") orang yang tidak sadar dan hilang akal warasnya. Maka Allah berfirman:
t_id.iwq: Kami lebih mengetahui dalam keadaan bagaimana mereka mendengarkan sewaktu mereka mendengarkan kamu, dan sewaktu mereka berbisik-bisik (yaitu) ketika orang-orang zalim itu berkata: "Kamu tidak lain hanyalah mengikuti seorang laki-laki yang kena sihir".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «نحن أعلم بما يستمعون به» بسببه من الهزء «إذ يستمعون إليك» قراءتك «وإذ هم نجوى» يتناجون بينهم أي يتحدثون «إذ» بدل من إذ قبله «يقول الظالمون» في تناجيهم «إن» ما «تتبعون إلا رجلاً مسحورا» مخدوعا مغلوبا على عقله. قال تعالى
tafsir.siraj-ar: نَّحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَسۡتَمِعُونَ بِهِۦٓ إِذۡ يَسۡتَمِعُونَ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِذۡ هُمۡ نَجۡوَىٰٓ إِذۡ يَقُولُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ إِن تَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا رَجُلٗا مَّسۡحُورًا (هُمْ نَجْوَى: يَتَنَاجَوْنَ، وَيَتَحَدَّثُونَ فِيمَا بَيْنَهُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kami lebih mengetahui dalam keadaan bagaimana mereka mendengarkan) karena mereka memperolok-olokkanmu (sewaktu mereka mendengarkan kamu) sewaktu mendengarkan bacaan Alquranmu (dan sewaktu berbisik-bisik) di antara sesama mereka (yaitu ketika) kata idz di sini menjadi badal daripada kata idz yang sebelumnya (orang-orang zalim itu berkata) di dalam bisikan-bisikan mereka ("Tiada lain) tidak lain (orang yang kalian ikuti ini hanyalah seorang laki-laki yang kena sihir.") orang yang tidak sadar dan hilang akal warasnya. Maka Allah berfirman

ar: ٱنظُرۡ كَیۡفَ ضَرَبُوا۟ لَكَ ٱلۡأَمۡثَالَ فَضَلُّوا۟ فَلَا یَسۡتَطِیعُونَ سَبِیلࣰا
ar_simple: ٱنظر كیف ضربوا لك ٱلأمثال فضلوا فلا یستطیعون سبیلا

t.sahih-int: Look how they strike for you comparisons; but they have strayed, so they cannot [find] a way
t.asad: See to what they liken thee, [O Prophet simply] because they have gone astray and are now unable to find a way [to the truth]
t.yusuf-ali: See what similes they strike for thee: but they have gone astray, and never can they find a way
t.pickthall: See what similitudes they coin for thee, and thus are all astray, and cannot find a road
t.arberry: Behold, how they strike similitudes for thee, and go astray, and cannot find a way
t.hilali-khan: See what examples they have put forward for you. So they have gone astray, and never can they find a way
t.itani: Note what they compared you to. They are lost, and unable to find a way.
t.mubarakpuri: See what examples they have put forward for you. So they have gone astray, and never can they find a way.
t.qarib: See how they refer to you? They have strayed and cannot find the way
t.wahiduddin: See to what they liken you! But they are lost and cannot find the right path
t.shakir: See what they liken you to! So they have gone astray and cannot find the way
t.haleem: See what they think you are like! But they are lost and cannot find the right way
t.maariful: See how they have made (silly) statements about you; so they have gone astray and cannot find a way
t.khattab: See how they call you names ˹O Prophet˺! So they have gone so ˹far˺ astray that they cannot find the ˹Right˺ Way
t.ghali: Look how they strike similitudes for you. So they have erred and have been unable (to find) a way
t.irving: Watch what sort of stories they make up about you. They have strayed away and are unable to find a way back
t.iwq: Look how they strike for you comparisons; but they have strayed, so they cannot find a way

t_id.kemenag: Lihatlah bagaimana mereka membuat perumpamaan-perumpamaan terhadapmu; karena itu mereka menjadi sesat dan tidak dapat lagi menemukan jalan (yang benar).
t_id.sabiq: Lihatlah bagaimana mereka membuat perumpamaan-perumpamaan terhadapmu. Mereka mengumpamakan dirimu sebagai orang yang tersihir, seorang dukun dan penyair. Dengan begitu mereka keluar dari tatacara berargumentasi yang benar sehingga mereka tidak menemukan jalan agar tuduhan mereka terhadapmu dapat diterima. Atau karena mereka memang lebih mengutamakan jalan itu daripada jalan petunjuk sehingga tidak menemukannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lihatlah bagaimana mereka membuat perumpamaan-perumpamaan terhadap dirimu) yaitu dengan menuduhmu sebagai orang yang terkena sihir, juru peramal, dan seorang penyair (karena itu mereka menjadi sesat) dari jalan hidayah (dan tidak dapat lagi menemukan jalan) yang benar untuk mencapai hidayah.
t_id.iwq: Lihatlah bagaimana mereka membuat perumpamaan-perumpamaan terhadapmu; karena itu mereka menjadi sesat dan tidak dapat lagi menemukan jalan (yang benar).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «انظر كيف ضربوا لك الأمثال» بالمسحور والكاهن والشاعر «فضَلُّوا» بذلك عن الهدى «فلا يستطيعون سبيلاً» طريقا إليه «وقالوا» منكرين للبعث
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ ضَرَبُواْ لَكَ ٱلۡأَمۡثَالَ فَضَلُّواْ فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ سَبِيلٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lihatlah bagaimana mereka membuat perumpamaan-perumpamaan terhadap dirimu) yaitu dengan menuduhmu sebagai orang yang terkena sihir, juru peramal, dan seorang penyair (karena itu mereka menjadi sesat) dari jalan hidayah (dan tidak dapat lagi menemukan jalan) yang benar untuk mencapai hidayah

ar: وَقَالُوۤا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَـٰمࣰا وَرُفَـٰتًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوثُونَ خَلۡقࣰا جَدِیدࣰا
ar_simple: وقالوا أءذا كنا عظما ورفتا أءنا لمبعوثون خلقا جدیدا

t.sahih-int: And they say, "When we are bones and crumbled particles, will we [truly] be resurrected as a new creation
t.asad: And [thus, too,] they say, "After we will have become bones and dust, shall we, forsooth, be raised from the dead in a new act of creation
t.yusuf-ali: They say: "What! when we are reduced to bones and dust, should we really be raised up (to be) a new creation
t.pickthall: And they say: When we are bones and fragments, shall we forsooth, be raised up as a new creation
t.arberry: They say, 'What, when we are bones and broken bits, shall we really be raised up again in a new creation
t.hilali-khan: And they say: "When we are bones and fragments (destroyed), should we really be resurrected (to be) a new creation
t.itani: And they say, “When we have become bones and fragments, shall we really be resurrected as a new creation?”
t.mubarakpuri: And they say: "When we are bones and fragments (destroyed), should we really be resurrected (to be) a new creation"
t.qarib: And they say, "After we are but bones and dust, can we be resurrected to a new creation
t.wahiduddin: What!" they say, "When we are turned to bones and dust, shall we be restored to life
t.shakir: And they say: What! when we shall have become bones and decayed particles, shall we then certainly be raised up, being a new creation
t.haleem: They also say, ‘What? When we are turned to bones and dust, shall we really be raised up in a new act of creation?’
t.maariful: And they say, “Once we are reduced to bones and dust, is it then that we will be raised, created anew?”
t.khattab: And they say ˹mockingly˺, “When we are reduced to bones and ashes, will we really be raised as a new creation?”
t.ghali: And they said, "Is it (true) that when we are bones and decomposed remains, will we indeed be made to rise again (as) a new creation
t.irving: They say: "When we are bones and mortal remains, will we be raised up in some fresh creation
t.iwq: And they say, "When we are bones and crumbled particles, will we truly be resurrected as a new creation

t_id.kemenag: Dan mereka berkata: "Apakah bila kami telah menjadi tulang belulang dan benda-benda yang hancur, apa benar-benarkah kami akan dibangkitkan kembali sebagai makhluk yang baru?"
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang ingkar terhadap hari kebangkitan itu berkata, "Apakah kami akan dibangkitkan kembali sebagai makhluk yang baru, setelah kami menjadi tulang-belulang dan potongan-potongan yang berserakan? Sesungguhnya yang demikian ini tidaklah masuk akal."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata) dalam keingkaran mereka terhadap adanya hari berbangkit ("Apakah bila kami telah menjadi tulang-belulang dan benda-benda yang hancur, apa benar-benarkah kami akan dibangkitkan kembali sebagai makhluk yang baru?").
t_id.iwq: Dan mereka berkata: "Apakah bila kami telah menjadi tulang belulang dan benda-benda yang hancur, apa benar-benarkah kami akan dibangkitkan kembali sebagai makhluk yang baru?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أئذا كنا عظاما ورفاتا أئنا لمبعوثون خلقا جديدا»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقَالُوٓاْ أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَٰمٗا وَرُفَٰتًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوثُونَ خَلۡقٗا جَدِيدٗا (وَرُفَاتًا: أَجْزَاءً مُفَتَّتَةً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata) dalam keingkaran mereka terhadap adanya hari berbangkit ("Apakah bila kami telah menjadi tulang-belulang dan benda-benda yang hancur, apa benar-benarkah kami akan dibangkitkan kembali sebagai makhluk yang baru)

ar: ۞ قُلۡ كُونُوا۟ حِجَارَةً أَوۡ حَدِیدًا
ar_simple: قل كونوا حجارة أو حدیدا

t.sahih-int: Say, "Be you stones or iron
t.asad: Say: "[You will be raised from the dead even though] you be stones or iron
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "(Nay!) be ye stones or iron
t.pickthall: Say: Be ye stones or iron
t.arberry: Say: 'Let you be stones, or iron
t.hilali-khan: Say (O Muhammad SAW) "Be you stones or iron
t.itani: Say, “Even if you become rocks or iron.
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "Be you stones or iron,"
t.qarib: Tell them: "Even if You have turned to stone or iron
t.wahiduddin: Say, "[yes] even if you turned to stones or iron
t.shakir: Say: Become stones or iron
t.haleem: Say, ‘[Yes] even if you were [as hard as] stone, or iron
t.maariful: Say, “Be you stones or iron
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “˹Yes, even if˺ you become stones, or iron
t.ghali: Say, "Be you stones, or iron
t.irving: SAY: "Become stones or iron
t.iwq: Say, "Be you stones or iron

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Jadilah kamu sekalian batu atau besi,
t_id.sabiq: Katakanlah kepada mereka, wahai Nabi, "Seandainyapun kalian itu batu yang tidak memiliki kehidupan, atau besi yang lebih keras dari batu,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) kepada mereka ("Jadilah kamu sekalian batu atau besi).
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Jadilah kamu sekalian batu atau besi,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل» لهم «كونوا حجارة أو حديدا»
tafsir.siraj-ar: ۞قُلۡ كُونُواْ حِجَارَةً أَوۡ حَدِيدًا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) kepada mereka ("Jadilah kamu sekalian batu atau besi)

ar: أَوۡ خَلۡقࣰا مِّمَّا یَكۡبُرُ فِی صُدُورِكُمۡۚ فَسَیَقُولُونَ مَن یُعِیدُنَاۖ قُلِ ٱلَّذِی فَطَرَكُمۡ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةࣲۚ فَسَیُنۡغِضُونَ إِلَیۡكَ رُءُوسَهُمۡ وَیَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هُوَۖ قُلۡ عَسَىٰۤ أَن یَكُونَ قَرِیبࣰا
ar_simple: أو خلقا مما یكبر فی صدوركم فسیقولون من یعیدنا قل ٱلذی فطركم أول مرة فسینغضون إلیك رءوسهم ویقولون متى هو قل عسى أن یكون قریبا

t.sahih-int: Or [any] creation of that which is great within your breasts." And they will say, "Who will restore us?" Say, "He who brought you forth the first time." Then they will nod their heads toward you and say, "When is that?" Say, "Perhaps it will be soon
t.asad: or any [other] substance which, to your minds, appears yet farther removed [from life]!" And [if] thereupon they ask, "Who is it that will' bring us back [to life]?"-say thou: "He who has brought you into being in the first instance." And [if] thereupon they shake their heads at thee [in disbelief] and ask, "When shall this be?"-say thou: "It may well be soon
t.yusuf-ali: Or created matter which, in your minds, is hardest (to be raised up),- (Yet shall ye be raised up)!" then will they say: "Who will cause us to return?" Say: "He who created you first!" Then will they wag their heads towards thee, and say, "When will that be?" Say, "May be it will be quite soon
t.pickthall: Or some created thing that is yet greater in your thoughts! Then they will say: Who shall bring us back (to life). Say: He Who created you at the first. Then will they shake their heads at thee, and say: When will it be? Say: It will perhaps be soon
